queries.question: Show me the equipment names that are common to all classes
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.equipmentName  from Classroom_Equipment join Equipment on Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId = Equipment.id join Classroom on Classroom_Equipment.classroomId = Classroom.id   GROUP BY Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Classroom_Equipment.classroomId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Classroom)

queries.question: What information is there on equipment including their quantity that is common to all classrooms?
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.equipmentName, Equipment.quantity  from Classroom_Equipment join Equipment on Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId = Equipment.id join Classroom on Classroom_Equipment.classroomId = Classroom.id   GROUP BY Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Classroom_Equipment.classroomId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Classroom)

queries.question: For each classroom, List the quantity of equipment.
queries.sql: select classroom.name , equipment.quantity from Classroom_Equipment join Equipment on Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId = Equipment.id join Classroom on Classroom_Equipment.classroomId = Classroom.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?quantity WHERE {
  ?classroom_equipment a :Classroom_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?classroom_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?classroom a :Classrooms .
  ?classroom_equipment p:hasClassroom ?classroom .
  ?classroom p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:quantity ?quantity .
}

queries.question: For every classroom, list information on equipment used including their quantity.
queries.sql: select classroom.name , equipment.equipmentname , equipment.quantity from Classroom_Equipment join Equipment on Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId = Equipment.id join Classroom on Classroom_Equipment.classroomId = Classroom.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?equipmentname ?quantity WHERE {
  ?classroom_equipment a :Classroom_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?classroom_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?classroom a :Classrooms .
  ?classroom_equipment p:hasClassroom ?classroom .
  ?classroom p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:equipmentName ?equipmentname .
  ?equipment p:quantity ?quantity .
}

queries.question: List the quantity of equipment that is common for all classrooms.
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.quantity  from Classroom_Equipment join Equipment on Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId = Equipment.id join Classroom on Classroom_Equipment.classroomId = Classroom.id   GROUP BY Classroom_Equipment.equipmentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Classroom_Equipment.classroomId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Classroom)

queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?equipmentname WHERE {
  ?classroom_equipment a :Classroom_Equipment .

  ?classroom_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?classroom a :Classrooms .

ambiguous_dsl.question: What equipment names do we have in every class?
Show me information on equipment each classroom uses including their quantity.
List the quantity of equipment available in every classroom.
